name: kakaopay-investor-explainer
description: Skill-only Codex plugin for Kakao Pay Securities support knowledge/content operators preparing beginner investor explanations from public notices.

interface.shortDescription: Explain public investment text without giving advice.
interface.longDescription: Helps Kakao Pay Securities customer-support knowledge/content operators convert public investment notices, product text, or research excerpts into plain-language explanations, key terms, risk checks, uncertainty notes, and source-grounded support drafts while refusing investment recommendations.
defaultPrompt: Explain this investment text for beginners.
Draft a safe support answer from this product notice.
Extract terms, risks, and uncertainties from this research.
